description: Powers drawing on the living world - commanding plants, bonding with animals, shapeshifting into wild forms, and thriving in the wilderness.
abilities: Animal Form
The shape of a wild animal adopted fully: form, senses, movement. Speech falls silent, but the caster may revert at will, stepping back as though waking from a vivid dream.
Animal Partner
A nearby animal recruited as loyal companion. It senses mood and intentions, refuses to stray, and searches tirelessly if separated.
Command Nature
A whispered rhyme coaxes plants into motion. Trees rustle, flowers bloom, vines expand. With enough conviction, the growth turns hostile: thorns lash and branches shake violently.
Courier
A friendly animal found nearby and whispered instructions to deliver a small item to a specific place or person within a day's travel.
Evening Star
A wisp of brilliant light summoned high into the open sky, hovering directly above like a personal star. Daylight spills across the landscape, following wherever the caster wanders.
Friend of the Land
Kinship claimed with a wilderness region so that every living thing within recognizes the caster as ally. In time, volunteer creatures build a natural fort at a chosen location.
Gills
A spritz of enchanted water and delicate gills sprout along the neck, granting the gift of breathing beneath the waves.
Memories of Stone
A personal story shared with a stone monument. It reciprocates with ancient wisdom: whether this world is real, what lies buried below, and where a lost artifact might rest.
Navigate
An instinct so deep that becoming lost is impossible. With focus, it guides companions toward hidden discoveries: a sheltering cave, forgotten ruins, or the den of a reclusive creature.
Pair Bond
Deep telepathic bond with an animal partner. Passive glimpses of sight and sound, a shadow of pain when hurt. In a trance, the caster inhabits the animal while their body sits dreaming.
Shapeshift
Any creature's form assumed, from housefly to elephant, with full awareness retained. The caster may speak telepathically with allies while wearing another creature's skin.
Shift Season
The elements manipulated to change the season across a vast area. Spring swallows winter. Autumn frost descends on summer. Fierce storms may follow an imprecise casting.
Shroud
Flora entreated to shelter a campsite. Shrubs and thorny vines emerge, concealing even a campfire. If threats approach, trees howl in warning and thorns draw blood.
Signal
A distress signal visible to other rangers: a column of smoke, a message in bark. Within the day, a fellow ranger arrives, well-equipped and willing.
Speak with Animal
A touch forming a brief telepathic bond with a non-hostile animal. It shares how it feels, what it has seen, what it wants. Complex ideas slip beyond its grasp.
Speak with Trees
A touch on a trunk connects to every tree in a contiguous forest. Ask the trees to search for something hidden among them, and the forest whispers back.
Thorn
A poisonous thorn conjured from an open palm and shot at a target. When it strikes, venom swells the skin, sealing shut eyes, voice, and magic in one instant.
Whisper on the Wind
A message riding the wind summons a flying creature: raven, griffin, or winged beast. Treated kindly, it serves faithfully. It will not attack unless provoked.
Wild Celebrity
Such respect among wild creatures that none attack unless harmed first. Speech with animals and trees becomes effortless, and a small army of native creatures can be rallied.
Wild Evolution
One's essence permanently intertwined with a chosen animal form, selected once and forever. The caster shifts freely between shapes, retaining awareness, and may still cast spells.
Wild Font
A touch on a container enchants its contents to surge forth in generous surplus. A pitcher floods the floor. A sack of grain bursts into a heaping pile.
World Wish
The seed for a new world. A spell consuming the caster's life forever. The body dissipates into light and a cascading wave transforms the planet: atmosphere, flora, oceans reborn.
